schedule.description: S3 — Arnaldi walkover / Cobolli into final
S4 — Men's Final preview B post

stories.title: Roland Garros Women's Final — Andreeva vs Chwalinska (TODAY, 3 PM Paris / 9 AM ET)
stories.angle: Women's final day-of coverage — two first-time Grand Slam finalists meet on Philippe-Chatrier; Chwalinska makes history as first qualifier ever in a Roland Garros final; Andreeva seeks to become the latest teenage Grand Slam champion

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Roland Garros women's final is today.

Mirra Andreeva (No. 8) vs Maja Chwalinska (No. 114) — both in their first Grand Slam final.

3 PM Paris. Philippe-Chatrier. History incoming. 🎾

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen #WTA
x_posts.tweet_type: FOLLOW-UP (preview covered June 5; today is match day)

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Maja Chwalinska became the first qualifier in Roland Garros history to reach the final.

She joins Goolagong (1971) and Evert (1973) — the only women to reach the RG final on their main draw debut.

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen #WTA
x_posts.tweet_type: FOLLOW-UP (preview covered June 5; today is match day)

stories.title: Zverev def. Mensik 7-5, 6-2, 3-6, 6-3 — Four Grand Slam Finals
stories.angle: Alexander Zverev defeats Jakub Mensik in 3h01m to reach his fourth Grand Slam final — and second at Roland Garros; Mensik had a medical timeout in the third set; Zverev controls the match from 3-0 up in the fourth to close it out

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Alexander Zverev is in his fourth Grand Slam final.

7-5, 6-2, 3-6, 6-3 over Mensik. Three hours, one minute.

He faces Cobolli on Sunday. One of them wins their first major.

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen #ATPTour
x_posts.tweet_type: FOLLOW-UP (SF preview covered June 5; result available June 6)

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Mensik won the third set with a medical timeout midway through. Zverev didn't flinch.

Went up 3-0 in the fourth and closed it out 6-3.

Fourth GS final. Still looking for the first title.

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen #ATPTour
x_posts.tweet_type: FOLLOW-UP (SF preview covered June 5; result available June 6)

article.headline: Zverev Beats Mensik 7-5, 6-2, 3-6, 6-3 to Reach Fourth Grand Slam Final at Roland Garros

stories.title: Arnaldi Withdraws with Viral Illness — Cobolli Into First Grand Slam Final
stories.angle: Matteo Arnaldi suffers vomiting and fever overnight Thursday, cannot keep food or liquid down despite medication Friday morning; withdraws from all-Italian SF — Flavio Cobolli advances via walkover to his first Grand Slam final; only the fourth walkover in Open Era Grand Slam semifinal history

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Matteo Arnaldi has withdrawn from today's Roland Garros SF with a viral illness — vomiting and fever since Thursday night.

Flavio Cobolli advances to his first Grand Slam final via walkover.

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen #ATPTour
x_posts.tweet_type: FOLLOW-UP (all-Italian SF matchday previewed June 5; result is a walkover)

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
The Arnaldi withdrawal is only the 4th walkover in Open Era Grand Slam SF history.

Cobolli faces Zverev on Sunday. Italy will have its first Grand Slam men's finalist since Adriano Panatta in 1976.

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen #ATPTour
x_posts.tweet_type: FOLLOW-UP (all-Italian SF matchday previewed June 5; result is a walkover)

stories.title: Men's Final Preview — Zverev vs Cobolli (Sunday, June 7, 3 PM Paris / 9 AM ET)
stories.angle: Sunday's final guarantees a first-time Grand Slam champion — Zverev has lost all three of his previous GS finals and seeks his first major title at age 28; Cobolli is the No. 10 seed in his first GS final; Zverev leads H2H 3-1 but Cobolli won their Munich 2026 meeting; first first-time men's GS champion since Sinner at AO 2024

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text:
Sunday's Roland Garros men's final:

Alexander Zverev (0-3 in GS finals) vs Flavio Cobolli (first Grand Slam final).

One of them wins their first major title. 3 PM Paris. Philippe-Chatrier.

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen #ATPTour

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text:
Zverev leads Cobolli 3-1 in their H2H — including a straight-sets win at last year's Roland Garros.

But Cobolli beat Zverev in Munich earlier this year.

On clay, on Sunday, with a Grand Slam on the line. 🎾

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen #ATPTour

article.headline: Zverev vs Cobolli: The Roland Garros Men's Final That Guarantees a First-Time Grand Slam Champion

stories.title: Roland Garros 2026 — A Tournament That Rewrote the Record Books
stories.angle: Meta-story capturing the historic elements of RG 2026: Chwalinska becomes first qualifier in RG final history; first all-Italian men's GS SF; Andreeva 4th-youngest RG finalist in 30 years; Sinner/Alcaraz/Djokovic all out before the final; four walkover in Open Era GS SF history

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Roland Garros 2026 by the numbers:

• First qualifier in RG women's final history
• First all-Italian men's GS SF ever
• 4th walkover in Open Era GS SF history
• Both men's finalists seek their first major

Some tournament.

#RolandGarros #TennisFanrecap #FrenchOpen #Tennis
